title: Luxe Estate
quote: "Redefining the digital luxury real estate experience. Luxe Estate combines cinematic visualization with a robust infrastructure based on Server Components and Server Actions for exceptional performance."
challenges: Complex state synchronization between interactive maps (Leaflet) and server-side filters in Next.js 16.
Dynamic internationalization (i18n) management affecting both the UI and real-time database queries.
Optimizing high-resolution image loading to maintain a 'Luxe' experience without penalizing Core Web Vitals.
solutions: Server Components First architecture to minimize client-side JS and maximize SEO performance.
Implementation of Server Actions with strict validation and optimistic UI for near-instant response in favorites and auth.
Hybrid filtering system leveraging Supabase PostgREST for efficient and secure server-side querying.
imageAlt: Minimalist architectural visualization of a luxury estate with clean lines, sharp edges, and dramatic monochromatic lighting
